name: TXC Corporation
summary: TXC Corporation engages in the research, design, development, production, and sale of crystal and oscillators products in Taiwan and internationally. The company's products include crystals, oscillators, and sensors, as well as automotive crystals. Its products are used in various applications, including mobile communication, wearable devices, Internet of Things, server, storage, automotive, telecommunication, and medical devices. TXC Corporation was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
